title: Add visual regression testing
original_text: Added visual regression testing using Percy. Implemented screenshot comparison for all pages. Added visual testing for responsive breakpoints. Implemented visual testing for different themes (light/dark). Added visual testing for different user states (logged in/out). Added visual diff reporting. Added CI integration for automated visual tests. Result: 89 visual tests pass.
expected_subject: test(visual): add visual regression testing with Percy
expected_body_lines: - Implement screenshot comparison for all pages
- Add visual testing for responsive breakpoints
- Add visual testing for light/dark themes
- Add visual testing for user states
- Add visual diff reporting and CI integration
expected_command: git commit -m "test(visual): add visual regression testing with Percy"
